tasks.task: Create a new project called 'Q3 Launch' with a start date of August 1 and add 3 tasks

notes.note: Struggled to find where to add a start date. Clicked into Settings first before finding the Date field.
Could not find the Add Task button. Kept looking in the sidebar.
Created the project but could not figure out how to add tasks — expected a modal not inline editing.
Slow but completed. Said: 'This isn't where I expected it to be, but I found it.'

tasks.task: Assign the first task to a team member and set a due date of August 15

notes.note: Easy. The assignee dropdown was clear.
Found it quickly once in the task.
Due date field was not visible because the task row was collapsed. Did not know to expand it.

tasks.task: Set a task as recurring — repeat every Monday

notes.note: Never found the recurrence option. Said: 'I assume this doesn't exist or it's buried somewhere.'
Found it in the task detail panel eventually. Took about 2 minutes.
Looked in the task context menu, in settings, and gave up after 3 minutes.
Found the recurrence option in the date picker — said it was not obvious.
Did not complete. 'I would just Google this.'
